description: Personal Wealth Compass: Monte Carlo retirement engine. Inputs current_nav+age+retire_age+annual_savings+annual_spending+risk_profile (conservative/moderate/aggressive/lifecycle). 10000-sim lognormal MC using live Capital Compass forward ERs + Markowitz w'Σw + 30y consensus correlation matrix. Outputs prob_success, trajectory percentiles, sequence-of-returns risk, required savings (bisection), inflation-deflated terminal NAV, sensitivities, benchmark comparison, plain-English verdict.
